name: Catalan Nougat (Turron De Agramunt)
recipeIngredient: Hazelnuts, roasted and peeled, 3 1/2 oz (about 3/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place honey in a heavy saucepan and heat over medium heat.
2. Stir with a wooden spoon until the honey boils.
3. Remove from heat and continue stirring until it reaches pancake syrup consistency.
4. Add egg whites and return to heat; cook until it achieves a toffee-like consistency (hard-ball stage).
5. Incorporate nuts and mix well.
6. Spread mixture in a jelly-roll pan lined with edible rice paper.
7. Cover with a second sheet of rice paper and weight the top.
8. Allow to cool, then cut into 1-inch squares.
When preparing nougat, ensure nuts are warm. For freshly peeled nuts, cover them with foil to retain warmth. For previously peeled nuts, reheat in an oven set to 200°F (about 93°C) for 15 minutes before use.
